paper.title: Galactic runaway O and Be stars found using Gaia DR3

review.summary: Paper uses Gaia DR3 astrometric data to search for Galactic runaway O and Be stars in GOSC and BeSS catalogs. Contains 10 internal LaTeX tables: quality cuts (Tab:Cuts), field star velocity/spatial statistics (Tab:FitsAfterClippingField), runaway star velocity/spatial statistics (Tab:FitsAfterClippingRun), top-10 GOSC runaways (Tab:GOSC_Runaways), top-10 BeSS runaways (Tab:BeSS_Runaways), runaways by spectral type (Tab:SpectralType), literature comparison (Tab:Publications), Gaussian fits for RSR velocities (Tab:GuassianFits), simulation inputs (Tab:Simulations_Input), simulation outputs (Tab:Simulations_Output). External resources: CDS for complete runaway tables, ESA Gaia Archive, BeSS database, SIMBAD, NASA ADS. Complete runaway catalogs (106 GOSC + 69 BeSS) available only at CDS, not in paper.
